text:
Market today: Mixed volatility signals mean no clear directional conviction right now — bulls and bears both stuck. The real driver for your names is the OpenAI IPO delay story, which adds uncertainty to the broader tech narrative. Margin means a choppy, directionless tape can grind you down even without a big drop.

Your holdings: PLTR is your sharpest pain point — down 17.56% and still flagged SELL; it needs a decision, not patience. AVGO is your largest position, down 13.18% and flagged TRIM — on margin, a big losing position in your biggest slot is a real risk. SPAL is down 16.49% and is a 2x leveraged decaying ETF — that decay accelerates in choppy markets; it's burning quietly. SPCX is brand-new, very volatile IPO with thin data — treat it like live ammunition.

Watch: (1) Whether tech sentiment cracks further on the OpenAI delay — that hits your whole book. (2) AVGO price action near $336 stop — your largest position breaking down on margin is the biggest single risk.

Bottom line: Your margin book has three bleeding positions — PLTR, AVGO, and SPAL — and today's tape gives you no reason to wait.
